sections.paragraph:
in pause פֶּתִי [“also without pause, Pro 9:4, 16 14:15 ”], plur. פְּתָיִים Pro 1:22, 32 , and פְּתָאִים Pro 1:4 Psa 116:6, m.

(1) simplicity, folly (see the root No. 2), Pro 1:22.

(2) concr. a silly person, one easily persuaded and enticed, Pro 7:7 22:3 27:12 Psa 116:6 specially, a credulous person, Pro 14:15 unskilful, Psa 19:8.
